title: bidens hendersonensis var. hendersonensis
intro: Bidens hendersonensis var. hendersonensis, also known as Henderson's biden or Henderson's beggar-ticks, is a rare and endemic plant species native to Henderson Island in the Pitcairn Islands. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens hendersonensis var. hendersonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and its leaves and stems can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves.
